title: coleus fragrantissimus
intro: Coleus fragrantissimus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus fragrantissimus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Coleus fragrantissimus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and infusions of the leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
